Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel P. Iannitelli, esq., 415.874.3500, for plaintiff SF Rents; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SF RENTS' Motion For Entry Of Judgment is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Mtn For Entry Of Judgmnt
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL P. IANNITELLI OF THE MCGARY FIRM, TEL. NO. 874-3500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
RICK CAMACHO, TEL. NO. (925) 829-8432, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - Notice was not given to Plaintiff's counsel after the tentative ruling came out. The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF SF RENTS' Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation is continued to December 4, 2012. Opposition to be filed by November 28, 2012. Reply to be filed by November 30, 2012. Courtesy copies to be delivered to Dept. 302. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
